decision_topics.plain_language_question_shape: When a later slice asks for judgement, describe whether the subtitle design and visual feel are acceptable enough for production use, and mention any reservations.
available_evidence: ED-10am source gate matrix: clip-ed10am-production-limitation-lift-stage-1-001
ED-10al diagnostic rehearsal: clip-ed10al-final-render-path-stage-3-rehearsal-001
style tokens survived: True
stable body text survived: True
badge/accent/backplate route survived: True
line-break/safe-area metadata survived: True
ED-10al records style-token, stable body text, badge/accent/backplate, and safe-area survival.
Prior user observation allows forward progress without reopening display/layout polish.
The diagnostic presentation path is acceptable enough to move forward.
No old candidate or cut review axis is reopened by ED-10am.
missing_evidence: Explicit human acceptance that the subtitle design is production-ready.
Any required representative production-sequence typography review.
Explicit creative approval for production use.
Any final editorial or representative-sequence acceptance packet.
safe_freeform_answer_could_mention: whether the current visual direction is acceptable
specific reservations or blocked design conditions
decision_topics.stop_boundary_before_approval: Do not convert a vague or partial future answer into approval; keep missing or unclear conditions pending.
unsafe_overclaiming_examples: Treating diagnostic survival readback as production subtitle design acceptance.
Treating forward-progress preference as creative approval.
Reopening old layout polish or Candidate 0-3 review as if ED-10an required it.

decision_topics.plain_language_question_shape: When a later slice asks for judgement, describe whether rights, publishing context, and public-use clearance are satisfied or still pending.
available_evidence: ED-10al and ED-10am make no rights clearance claim.
Ignored proof outputs stay same-machine diagnostic evidence.
No upload, visibility, platform metadata, or scheduling action occurs in ED-10al/ED-10am.
Production design, render, creative, rights, and publishing gates remain false or pending.
missing_evidence: Rights clearance or owner decision for source material and distribution context.
Platform/account-specific publishing acceptance and final metadata decision.
All upstream acceptances required for public use.
safe_freeform_answer_could_mention: known rights or publication clearance status
decision_topics.stop_boundary_before_approval: Do not convert a vague or partial future answer into approval; keep missing or unclear conditions pending.
unsafe_overclaiming_examples: Inferring rights clearance from local diagnostic generation.
Preparing upload or public release actions from diagnostic evidence.
Granting public-use permission before rights and publishing owners answer.

plain_language_user_instructions: A later user may answer naturally in one paragraph.
A later user may use a few bullets if that is easier.
The user does not need to follow field names or labels.
The user does not need to provide screenshots for this card.
agent_internal_normalization_allowed: map a clear answer to the matching topic id
carry explicit reservations into missing evidence or pending notes
keep ambiguous or absent approvals pending
preserve rights and public-use unknowns as unknown
unknowns_remain_unknown_examples: production subtitle design acceptance not mentioned

next_executable_route.alternate_route_condition: Use only if a concrete diagnostic gap is found; ED-10ap does not identify such a gap.
next_executable_route.purpose: Record a short freeform user decision card for a later slice without asking for or granting approval now.
first_steps: Keep ED-10ao as the source owner-review preparation packet.
Present at most three freeform topics when a later slice asks for user judgement.
Normalize future answers internally while preserving unknowns as unknown.
must_not_do: ask the user for a decision in ED-10ap
expose hidden schema fields as user input
request repeat layout polish or old candidate reviews
